title: Tokyo Cherry Blossoms
description: Experience the magical hanami season in Tokyo with this carefully curated 5-day itinerary. Visit the best cherry blossom spots including Ueno Park, Chidorigafuchi, and Shinjuku Gyoen. Includes food tours in Tsukiji Market and evening explorations of illuminated sakura.

title: Kyoto Temples & Gardens
description: Immerse yourself in ancient Kyoto with visits to Fushimi Inari's 10,000 torii gates, the golden Kinkaku-ji, serene Ryoan-ji rock garden, and the bamboo groves of Arashiyama. Perfect for fall foliage season.

title: Osaka Food Paradise
description: Dive into Japan's kitchen with this intensive food tour. Dotonbori street food, kushikatsu alley, ramen shops, and hidden izakayas. Includes Osaka Castle and nighttime exploration of Namba.

title: Mt. Fuji & Hakone Adventure
description: Experience Japan's iconic mountain with Lake Ashi cruise, Hakone Ropeway, traditional onsen stays, and the Open Air Museum. Clear summer views of Mt. Fuji from multiple vantage points.

title: Hiroshima Peace Journey
description: A moving journey through Hiroshima's Peace Memorial Park and Museum, followed by the magical floating torii gate of Miyajima Island. Includes Itsukushima Shrine and local okonomiyaki experience.

title: Paris Classics
description: Classic Parisian experience with Eiffel Tower, Louvre, Notre-Dame, Montmartre, and Seine river cruises. Perfect blend of iconic landmarks, hidden cafes, and local experiences in the City of Light.

title: Ancient Rome
description: Journey through 2,000 years of history with the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, Vatican Museums, and Sistine Chapel. Includes authentic Roman cuisine and gelato tours.

title: Barcelona Gaudi Experience
description: Explore Gaudi's masterpieces including Sagrada Familia, Park Güell, and Casa Batlló. Beach time at Barceloneta, Gothic Quarter exploration, and authentic tapas crawls.

title: Amsterdam Canals & Culture
description: Canal boat tours, Van Gogh Museum, Anne Frank House, and bike rides through Vondelpark. Spring tulip season with Keukenhof Gardens day trip option.

title: London Highlights
description: Comprehensive London experience with Tower of London, British Museum, Westminster Abbey, Buckingham Palace, and West End shows. Includes traditional pub culture and afternoon tea.

title: Prague Medieval Charm
description: Fairy-tale Prague with its astronomical clock, Charles Bridge, Prague Castle complex, and Old Town Square. Beer halls, river cruises, and fall foliage in lesser-known neighborhoods.

title: Swiss Alps Adventure
description: Ultimate Alpine experience with Jungfraujoch, Matterhorn, scenic train rides through Bernese Oberland, paragliding in Interlaken, and pristine mountain lakes.

title: Greek Islands Hopping
description: Island-hopping paradise through Santorini's caldera sunsets, Mykonos nightlife, and Crete's ancient ruins. Beach days, Greek tavernas, and ferry adventures across the Aegean.

title: Bangkok Street Food Safari
description: Dive into Bangkok's incredible street food scene with market tours, boat noodles, pad thai workshops, and night market adventures. Includes Grand Palace and Wat Pho temple visits.

title: Hanoi & Ha Long Bay
description: Hanoi's Old Quarter charm and overnight cruise through Ha Long Bay's limestone karsts. Includes water puppets, pho tours, and kayaking in emerald waters.

title: Seoul Modern & Traditional
description: Perfect blend of traditional palaces and cutting-edge Seoul. Gyeongbokgung Palace, Bukchon Hanok Village, Gangnam shopping, Korean BBQ, and K-pop culture hotspots.

title: Singapore Fusion
description: Compact city-state packed with experiences. Gardens by the Bay, hawker center food tours, Marina Bay Sands, Chinatown, Little India, and Arab Street in one efficient itinerary.

title: NYC Hustle
description: The ultimate NYC experience: Central Park, Times Square, Broadway shows, MoMA, 9/11 Memorial, Brooklyn Bridge, and diverse food scenes from pizza to bagels to Michelin dining.

title: Grand Canyon Road Trip
description: Epic Southwest road trip through Grand Canyon, Sedona, Monument Valley, and Antelope Canyon. Sunrise hikes, stargazing, and Navajo culture experiences.

title: Buenos Aires Tango
description: Passionate Buenos Aires with tango shows and lessons, La Boca colorful streets, Recoleta Cemetery, Argentine steakhouses, and Malbec wine tastings.
